# Umbraco CMS Project

## Project Overview
This is an Umbraco CMS website built with .NET.

## Checklist
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements — Umbraco CMS site using .NET CLI
- [x] Scaffold the Project — Umbraco 17.2.2 on .NET 10, scaffolded with `dotnet new umbraco`
- [x] Customize the Project — Full site built: Layout, Homepage, CSS, JS (inspired by netafimusa.com, user-focused redesign)
- [x] Install Required Extensions — No extensions required
- [x] Compile the Project — `dotnet build` passes with 0 errors
- [x] Create and Run Task — VS Code task created; site running at http://localhost:5000
- [x] Launch the Project — Server running; Umbraco installer at http://localhost:5000/umbraco
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete — README.md created with full setup guide
